TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kalemet == 珊瑚樹 kagak kakuniza subal :真核域 Eukaryota salaedan :植物界 Plantae panan :被子植物門 Magnoliophyta upiz :雙子葉植物綱 Magnoliopsida mata :川續斷目 Dipsacales sapamat :五福花科 Adoxaceae mikitinay :莢蒾屬 Viburnum hicahicaay :珊瑚樹 V. odoratissimum u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika Viburnum odoratissimum, commonly known as sweet viburnum, is a shrub or small tree in the family Adoxaceae. It is native to Asia, and commonly cultivated as a garden ornamental elsewhere.
S.PHON: == kar~ɾəmət == *** kagak kakuniza subar~ɾ :*** əukarjota sar~ɾaədan :*** pr~ɾantaə panan :***** magnor~ɾiopħjta upiz :****** magnor~ɾiopsida mata :**** dipsaʦar~ɾəs sapamat :**** ado*aʦəaə mikitinaj :*** *iburnum ħiʦaħiʦaaj :*** *. odoratissimum u siwkaj nu nipar~ɾuma u sanək nu nipar~ɾuma mar~ɾaħəʦi tu imər~ɾaŋ pasubana i ʦaʦudadan a r~ɾaʦur~ɾ u zuma a ʦidəkaj a kamu, sauŋaj misapajuʔ~ʡ a ʦidəkaj u sur~ɾit nu zuma a kamu-ħur~ɾam atu amir~ɾika *iburnum odoratissimum, ʦommonr~ɾj known as swəət *iburnum, is a sħrub or smar~ɾr~ɾ trəə in tħə famir~ɾj ado*aʦəaə. it is nati*ə to asia, and ʦommonr~ɾj ʦur~ɾti*atəd as a gardən ornaməntar~ɾ ər~ɾsəwħərə.
S.FORM: == kalemet == 珊瑚樹 kagak kakuniza subal :真核域 Eukaryota salaedan :植物界 Plantae panan :被子植物門 Magnoliophyta upiz :雙子葉植物綱 Magnoliopsida mata :川續斷目 Dipsacales sapamat :五福花科 Adoxaceae mikitinay :莢蒾屬 Viburnum hicahicaay :珊瑚樹 V. odoratissimum u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika Viburnum odoratissimum, commonly known as sweet viburnum, is a shrub or small tree in the family Adoxaceae. It is native to Asia, and commonly cultivated as a garden ornamental elsewhere.
S.PHON: == kar~ɾəmət == *** kagak kakuniza subar~ɾ :*** əukarjota sar~ɾaədan :*** pr~ɾantaə panan :***** magnor~ɾiopħjta upiz :****** magnor~ɾiopsida mata :**** dipsaʦar~ɾəs sapamat :**** ado*aʦəaə mikitinaj :*** *iburnum ħiʦaħiʦaaj :*** *. odoratissimum u siwkaj nu nipar~ɾuma u sanək nu nipar~ɾuma mar~ɾaħəʦi tu imər~ɾaŋ pasubana i ʦaʦudadan a r~ɾaʦur~ɾ u zuma a ʦidəkaj a kamu, sauŋaj misapajuʔ~ʡ a ʦidəkaj u sur~ɾit nu zuma a kamu-ħur~ɾam atu amir~ɾika *iburnum odoratissimum, ʦommonr~ɾj known as swəət *iburnum, is a sħrub or smar~ɾr~ɾ trəə in tħə famir~ɾj ado*aʦəaə. it is nati*ə to asia, and ʦommonr~ɾj ʦur~ɾti*atəd as a gardən ornaməntar~ɾ ər~ɾsəwħərə.
